candidate_label: NFC GVA implicit price deflator from matching current and real GVA
source_title: Gross value added of nonfinancial corporate business

candidate_label: Price per unit of real GVA of nonfinancial corporate business
source_title: Price per unit of real gross value added of nonfinancial corporate business
source_description: Direct BEA validation counterpart for the NFC current/real GVA ratio.
limitations: Validation counterpart, not an independent CORP or FC deflator.
notes: Multiply the price-per-unit ratio by 100 for index-scale comparison.

source_description: BEA Account Code: A191RD For more information about this series, please see http://www.bea.gov/national/.
limitations: Economy-wide GDP boundary includes households, government, and noncorporate activity.
notes: Proxy classification does not alter S11B provider conclusions.

candidate_label: Gross value added: GDP: Business: Nonfarm (chain-type price index)
source_title: Gross value added: GDP: Business: Nonfarm (chain-type price index)
source_description: BEA Account Code: B358RG For more information about this series, please see http://www.bea.gov/national/.
limitations: Nearer to corporate production than GDP but includes noncorporate nonfarm business.
notes: Proxy classification does not alter S11B provider conclusions.

candidate_label: Business Sector: Value-Added Output Price Deflator for All Workers
source_title: Business Sector: Value-Added Output Price Deflator for All Workers
limitations: BLS productivity-program business boundary is not the NIPA corporate boundary.
notes: Proxy classification does not alter S11B provider conclusions.

candidate_label: Nonfarm Business Sector: Value-Added Output Price Deflator for All Workers
source_title: Nonfarm Business Sector: Value-Added Output Price Deflator for All Workers
limitations: Excludes farms but still includes noncorporate business and does not match CORP/NFC.
notes: Proxy classification does not alter S11B provider conclusions.

source_description: Chain-Type Price Indexes for Value Added by Industry (A) (Q)
